name: LabTrack Pro
tagline: 🔒 Eliminate Pathology Disputes. Streamline Lab Operations.
desc: An enterprise-grade pathology management system with barcode sample tracking, smart abnormal value flagging, auto-split referral ledgers, and secure patient report downloads via WhatsApp OTP.
needs: Pathology labs, diagnostic centers, and radiology clinics looking to eliminate referral disputes, digitize report delivery, and monitor overall business health.

plans.name: Pathology Laboratory Lite
features: Local desktop installation (Electron + SQLite)
Branded test report PDF generation
Basic referral commission tracking ledger
Manual email/WhatsApp PDF sharing link
30-day post-delivery technical support

plans.name: Pathology Center Enterprise
features: Cloud VPS database synchronization
Secure Patient Portal (OTP mobile log-in)
Doctor Portal (referred patients list & ledger)
Meta API WhatsApp automated report link delivery
60-day priority support + Custom integrations
Rapid Patient Registration: Check-in & select test packages in under 60 seconds.
Automated Commission Engine: Configurable flat or percentage referral tracking per test/doctor.
Smart Result Flagging: Auto-flags normal, abnormal, or critical result ranges with visual red alerts.
Branded PDF & Secure QR: Generates digital report PDFs with integrated QR codes for secure verification.
WhatsApp Portal Delivery: Patients scan QR or receive OTP via mobile to download reports without passwords.

name: RecallMD
tagline: 📈 Boost Patient Retention. Automate Vaccination Recalls.
desc: Intelligent post-consultation CRM that schedules vaccination schedules and chronic check-ups, sending automated WhatsApp reminders that recovery missed revenue.
needs: Dental, pediatric, ophthalmology, and general practice clinics experiencing patient drop-offs and manual follow-up inefficiencies.

plans.name: Standalone Follow-up Desk
features: Local database setup (SQLite)
Bulk patient database migration from CSV
Manual WhatsApp Web messaging template trigger
Basic scheduling calendar dashboard

plans.name: Automated Engagement Engine
features: Full WhatsApp Business API integration
Daily auto-cron scheduler at 8:00 AM
Variable-supported templates (names, doctors, dates)
Estimated Revenue Recovery analytics dashboard
Dynamic Reminder Scheduler: Schedule by visit date, vaccination calendar, or annual check-ups.
Variable Template Engine: Personalized message variables like [patient_name], [doctor_name], and [condition].
Official WhatsApp Routing: Links to Twilio or WATI API to ensure zero-spam compliance.
Revenue Recovery Tracker: Estimates recovery amount by matching missed appointments with visit fees.

name: TokenQ
tagline: ⚡ Cut OPD Waiting Time by 50%. Clean Up Waiting Rooms.
desc: Offline-first LAN patient coordinator that broadcasts live queue feeds to waiting room TVs, automatically dispatching token slips and real-time tracking links directly to patient mobile numbers.
needs: Clinics, OPD centers, and labs seeking to eliminate waiting room congestion and coordinate doctor calling workflows.

plans.name: Single OPD / Clinic
features: Single doctor queue management console
Local network TV display page (no internet required)
Local server setup on receptionist PC
30 days support

plans.name: Multi-OPD / Hospital Enterprise
features: Multiple doctors & department series (OPD, LAB, GEN)
Priority queue toggle (senior citizen, emergency status)
SMS backup notifications
Custom clinic branding & audio chime alerts
Instant TV Board: Fullscreen real-time queue display showing serving & waiting tokens.
No-Internet LAN Server: Runs purely on clinic's local WiFi with Zero cloud dependency.
Doctor Calling Console: Simple browser interface for doctors to call next, skip, or pause queue.
WhatsApp Token Delivery: Auto-sends token slips and live queue tracking links to patients' WhatsApp.
Priority Queues: Dedicated rapid queue settings for emergencies, senior citizens, or VIPs.

name: WellnessDesk
desc: Session package balance tracking and attendance manager for fitness and wellness studios, sending automated WhatsApp alerts to members 7, 3, and 1 days before plan expiration.
needs: Yoga studios, physiotherapy clinics, spas, and fitness centers struggling to track package session consumption and expiring memberships.

plans.name: Studio Starter Desk
features: Single-device local database (SQLite)
Member registration, photo upload, plan logs
Standard package duration & expiration tracking
Daily attendance check-in sheet

plans.name: Multi-Therapist Hub
features: Multi-device local network access (WiFi)
Therapist calendar and booking scheduler
WhatsApp auto-reminders and renewal prompts
Trainer slot conflict detection alerts
Visual Member Status: Instant color-coded badges for active, expiring, or expired memberships.
Session Balance Ledger: Deducts sessions from member balances on attendance with automatic renewal prompts.
Conflict-Free Calendar: Drag-and-drop booking sheet with automatic therapist slot verification.
Automated Expiry Alerts: Triggers WhatsApp messages to members 7, 3, and 1 days before plan expiration.

name: RxPad Pro
desc: A streamlined medical generator with dictation, drug autocomplete from a local database, custom diagnosis templates, and high-resolution letterhead print exports.
needs: Doctors and specialists aiming to speed up consultation times, maintain clean patient records, and output standardized print-ready prescriptions.

plans.name: Standalone Prescription Desk
features: Offline desktop app (Tauri + SQLite)
5,000+ medicine catalog database
Branded clinic letterhead layout template
Local encrypted backup engine

plans.name: Cloud Prescription Sync
features: Cloud database backup and synchronization
Receptionist-doctor intake connection module
Chronological patient medical history charts
Custom medical certificate template builder
Voice-Enabled Builder: Dictation using Web Speech API trained in medical vocabulary.
Medicine Autocomplete: Autofills drug name, dosage, frequency, and instructions from a 5000+ local database.
Saved Protocol Templates: 3-click prescription generation using saved 'Doctor's Favorites' by diagnosis.
Branded PDFs & Certificates: Generates standard Rx charts and medical certificates in high-resolution print PDFs.

name: CareReview
tagline: ⭐ Turn Happy Patients Into Automated Google Reviews.
desc: Reputation tool that directs 5-star ratings to Google Maps, while routing critical feedback to private internal channels, instantly upgrading local search rankings.
needs: Medical facilities wanting to improve their local search rankings and filter dissatisfied reviews internally.

plans.name: Reputation Starter
features: Reception desk QR-code feedback form
Internal review tracking dashboard
Positive rating redirect to Google Reviews listing
Unpaid feedback CSV export

plans.name: AI Reputation Manager
features: Post-visit automated WhatsApp feedback links
AI-suggested professional responses template generator
Instant alert notifications to owner on negative ratings
Multi-branch reputation performance charts
Smart Routing Engine: Redirects 4-5 star ratings to Google, and keeps 1-3 star feedbacks in an internal admin panel.
Instant Negative Alerts: Triggers owner notifications on WhatsApp for poor ratings to enable immediate recovery.
Reputation Analytics: Tracks rating trends, staff performance, and keyword clouds from comments.

name: QuoteFlow
desc: Sales quote builder, order manager, and payment ledger for manufacturers, wholesalers, and trading businesses.
needs: Wholesalers, manufacturers, and dealers who struggle to track verbal price quotes, order stages, and outstanding balances.

plans.name: Quotation Desk
features: Single-device local database (SQLite)
Product catalog catalog (SKUs, GST, base price)

plans.name: Order Pipeline Suite
features: Kanban order pipeline tracking dashboard
One-click quotation to invoice generation

Multi-Tier Price List: Configure and switch catalog pricing between retail, wholesale, and dealer tiers instantly.
One-Click Quotations: Generates professional PDFs with calculated GST, discount rates, and terms.
Kanban Order Pipeline: Visual progress cards tracking order confirmations, production, and dispatch.
Ledger Payment Tracker: Records full, partial, or unpaid statuses with aging ledger logs.

name: SmartProof

plans.name: Single Agency Portal
features: Self-hosted deployment on agency's VPS

plans.name: White-Label Enterprise
features: Full logo and brand primary color customization
Custom domain mapping per client portal
Client billing console (invoice logs & PDF downloads)
Custom SMTP mail server configuration
Isolated Client Workspaces: Secure, independent logins for each client to review files privately.
Proof & Revision Engine: Upload graphic files, PDFs, or links with instant client approve/reject buttons and comment logs.
Branded White-Labeling: Customize colors, logo, navigation header, and use a custom domain (portal.agency.com).
Client Billing Console: Integrated invoice distribution where clients can view balances and download statements.

name: ShiftMate

needs: Restaurants, factories, retail outlets, and salons managing 10 to 100 shift-based or hourly employees.

plans.name: Attendance & Roster
features: Employee roster database
Weekly visual shift schedule grid
Daily attendance logging sheet

plans.name: Complete Payroll Desk
features: Custom salary structures (hourly, daily, fixed monthly)
Automatic overtime, leave, PF, and tax calculations
Bulk monthly salary slip PDF generator
Locked payroll processing ledger
Bulk Attendance Marking: 1-click 'Mark All Present' with fast adjustments for absentees, half-days, and holidays.
Shift Scheduling Grid: Weekly visual rosters with shift templates and swap trackers.
Automated Pay Slip Generator: Auto-calculates net pay based on days present, overtime hours, and custom deductions.
Digital Payslip PDF: Combines employee profile, allowances, and salary totals in a standard, print-ready document.

name: LeadBoard
desc: Mobile-first field sales CRM featuring drag-and-drop pipelines, lead assignment rules, and instant follow-up triggers.
needs: Real estate agents, insurance brokers, and sales teams requiring a lightweight, fast-loading CRM they can access on-site.

plans.name: Sales Agent Lite
features: Single-user sales agent database

Daily task list & manual note logging
PWA offline access caching

plans.name: Team Pipeline Manager
features: Multi-user roles (Manager, Salesperson)
Automatic lead distribution rules
Dynamic Kanban drag-and-drop deals board
Full manager pipeline performance dashboard
Responsive Kanban Board: Drag-and-drop cards between new, contacted, interested, negotiating, won, and lost stages.
Quick Follow-Up Prompts: Aggregates daily tasks and launches WhatsApp chats with pre-filled reminder texts in two taps.
Sales Performance Dashboard: Charts lead conversions, response times, and pipeline totals per agent.
Lead Source Attribution: Segment leads automatically by source (walk-in, Instagram, IndiaMART, cold call).

name: DashCore

plans.name: Dashboard Lite
features: Drag-and-drop spreadsheet column mapping wizard

plans.name: BI Enterprise Suite
features: Multiple data snapshot chronological comparison
Target goals progression tracking analytics

Goal Tracker: Set targets per metric and view progress bars with alerts for underperforming periods.
Executive Report PDF: Exports high-resolution, print-ready dashboards with logo integrations.

name: WhatsApp Business Automation

plans.name: Essential Auto-responder

plans.name: Omni-channel Workflow Suite

Agent Notification Alerts: Sends direct message notifications to assigned agents with full client details.
